backend/main.mo: Main actor defining ContentSection, PrintableGuide, and Technician types with query methods for retrieving sections and guides by content type, and technicians by zip code. Includes blob storage mixin and migration support.
backend/migration.mo: Migration module that transforms OldTechnician records (without coordinates) to NewTechnician records by adding default latitude and longitude fields set to 0.0.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting two high-confidence features: Google Maps integration for displaying technician locations in TechnicianFinder.tsx and a map toggle button in navigation.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Comprehensive summaries of all frontend components including App.tsx, educational sections, pest-specific content, photo scanner, quiz, printable guides, and technician finder with map integration.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with OKLCH color palette for light and dark modes, defining design tokens for background, foreground, primary, secondary, muted, accent, destructive, border, and chart colors.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point with viewport meta tag, app title 'Bed Bug Educational App', and script tag loading the React application from main.tsx.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root application component with QueryClientProvider, ErrorBoundary, and conditional rendering for QR code page or main educational content with header, footer, and bottom navigation icon.
frontend/src/components/BottomNavigation: Fixed bottom-right circular navigation button with maximum z-index (9999) and large touch target that navigates to the next logical route using useNextRoute hook.
frontend/src/components/EducationalConte: Main content component with hash-based tab navigation (scanner, identify, habitats, prevention, treatment, guides, findLocalHelp) and pest selection UI for 18 different pests, rendering appropriate educational sections based on selected pest and active tab.
frontend/src/components/ErrorBoundary.ts: React error boundary class component that catches render errors and displays a fallback UI with error details and a reset button to return to the main app.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Footer component displaying copyright notice, caffeine.ai attribution with heart icon, and disclaimer text about consulting professional pest control services.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Renders a sticky header with app branding (bug icon, title) and a share button that opens a QR code dialog for sharing the app.
frontend/src/components/pests/ArmyAntsCo: Educational content component describing army ant identification, behavior, habitats, and safety precautions with structured cards.
frontend/src/components/pests/BeetlesCon: Educational content component covering beetle identification, common indoor species, infestation signs, and entry points with structured cards.
frontend/src/components/pests/BlackAntsC: React component displaying identification, habitat, and control information for black ants with cards covering physical characteristics, nesting locations, attractants, and prevention methods.
frontend/src/components/pests/BlackStink: React component providing identification and management guidance for black stink bugs, including physical traits, entry behavior, hiding spots, and removal strategies with emphasis on their characteristic odor.
frontend/src/components/pests/CarpenterA: React component with detailed carpenter ant information including structural damage warnings, identification features (frass, rustling sounds), nesting habits, and professional treatment recommendations.
frontend/src/components/pests/Cockroache: React component covering cockroach identification by species (German, American, Oriental, Brown-Banded), signs of infestation (droppings, odor, egg cases), common hiding spots, and control methods.
frontend/src/components/pests/CommonHous: React component describing common house fly characteristics, life cycle, breeding sources, attractants, and prevention strategies with focus on sanitation and exclusion methods.
frontend/src/components/pests/EarwigsCon: React component displaying comprehensive information about earwigs including identification, physical characteristics, behavior patterns, habitats, attractants, and prevention methods using Card and Alert UI components.
frontend/src/components/pests/HeadLiceCo: React component providing detailed information about head lice including identification, signs, checking methods, transmission, risk factors, and treatment guidance using Card and Alert UI components with icons.
frontend/src/components/pests/LargeFlies: React component describing various large fly species (blow flies, flesh flies, cluster flies, horse flies) with identification details, signs of infestation, and health warnings using Card and Alert UI components.
frontend/src/components/pests/MiceConten: React component presenting mice identification, infestation signs, nesting materials, habitats, entry points, and health warnings using Card and Alert UI components with structured lists.
frontend/src/components/pests/MothsLarva: React component covering moth and larvae identification, distinguishing between clothes moths and pantry moths, infestation signs, locations, and attractants using Card and Alert UI components.
frontend/src/components/pests/RedAntsCon: React component displaying comprehensive information about red ants including identification, species types, nesting locations, and safety warnings about painful stings and allergic reactions.
frontend/src/components/pests/ScorpionsC: React component providing detailed scorpion information including physical characteristics, common North American species, habitats, nocturnal behavior patterns, and medical safety notices.
frontend/src/components/pests/SpidersCon: React component covering spider identification, common indoor species, venomous species like black widows, physical characteristics, and safety warnings about handling unknown spiders.
frontend/src/components/pests/TicksConte: React component detailing tick behavior, life cycles, disease transmission risks (Lyme disease, Rocky Mountain spotted fever), outdoor exposure locations, and health warnings about tick bites.
frontend/src/components/pests/WoodBeetle: React component describing wood-boring beetles including powderpost and old house borers, identification of exit holes and frass, structural damage signs, and common infestation locations in homes.
frontend/src/components/PhotoScanner.tsx: Main photo capture/upload component with camera controls, image editing (rotation, zoom, crop, enhance), and integration with saved scans gallery. Handles camera lifecycle, file uploads, and photo processing workflow.
Displays a grid of downloadable PDF guides filtered by content type, with download buttons and loading/empty states.
frontend/src/components/QrCodePage.tsx: Full-page component for sharing the app via QR code and copyable link, with download functionality and error handling for QR generation.
frontend/src/components/SavedScansGaller: Gallery view of saved pest scans with tag filtering, reordering controls, delete confirmation dialogs, and integration with the tags editor component.
frontend/src/components/SavedScanTagsEdi: Inline tag editor for saved scans allowing users to add, remove, and edit tags with keyboard shortcuts and badge UI.
frontend/src/components/sections/Habitat: Displays educational content about bed bug habitats, including common hiding spots (mattresses, furniture, walls), feeding behavior (nocturnal, CO₂ detection), and reproduction/lifecycle information in card-based UI components.
frontend/src/components/sections/HeatTre: Alert dialog component that displays critical safety warnings before accessing heat treatment checklist, including ammunition removal, furniture disposal warnings, and occupancy restrictions with confirm/cancel actions.
frontend/src/components/sections/Identif: Educational section showing how to identify bed bugs through visual cards covering adult bugs (size, color, features), life stages (eggs, nymphs, development), and bite marks with accompanying images.
frontend/src/components/sections/Prevent: Provides prevention guidance for avoiding bed bug infestations, covering travel precautions (hotel inspection, luggage handling) and used furniture inspection with detailed checklists and images.
frontend/src/components/sections/Treatme: Interactive heat treatment checklist with before/during/after phases, progress tracking using custom hooks, safety reminder dialog integration, and completion statistics with reset functionality.
frontend/src/components/ShareQrCodeDialo: Dialog component for sharing the app via QR code or link, with copy-to-clipboard and download functionality using external QR code API.
frontend/src/components/TechnicianFinder: Component for searching pest control technicians by zip code with validation, displaying results in a list or map view.
frontend/src/components/TechnicianMap.ts: Google Maps integration component that displays technician locations as markers with info windows showing business details.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React Query hook that manages backend actor creation with Internet Identity authentication, automatically recreating actors when identity changes and invalidating dependent queries.
frontend/src/hooks/useGoogleMaps.ts: React hook that loads the Google Maps JavaScript API script with Places library, managing loading state and errors with singleton pattern to prevent duplicate script loads.
frontend/src/hooks/useHashRoute.ts: Custom hash-based routing hook that normalizes URL hashes, listens to hash changes, and provides navigation helpers without external router dependencies.
frontend/src/hooks/useHeatTreatmentCheck: Hook for managing heat treatment checklist item completion state with localStorage persistence, providing toggle, reset, and completion statistics functionality.
Hook that manages a first-visit reminder dialog for heat treatment checklist, persisting confirmation state to localStorage.
frontend/src/hooks/useImageEditor.ts: Hook providing image editing capabilities including rotation, zoom, enhancement, and export to blob, processing images through canvas operations.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: React context and hook for Internet Identity authentication on ICP, managing login state, identity delegation, and AuthClient lifecycle with configurable options.
frontend/src/hooks/useNextRoute.ts: Hook that determines the next logical navigation destination in a predefined flow (scanner → identify → habitats → prevention → treatment → guides → findLocalHelp) based on current route.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: React Query hooks for fetching printable guides by content type and technicians by zip code from the backend actor.
frontend/src/hooks/useSavedScans.ts: Hook managing saved pest scans with localStorage persistence, supporting CRUD operations, reordering, and tag management with backward compatibility migration.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom CSS variables defining a warm educational color palette for light and dark modes, plus utility classes for checklist items and bottom navigation visibility.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that sets up React root with QueryClient provider for data fetching and InternetIdentityProvider for authentication.
frontend/src/types/google-maps.d.ts: TypeScript type declarations for Google Maps JavaScript API, defining interfaces for Map, Marker, InfoWindow, LatLng, LatLngBounds, and related options.
frontend/src/utils/assert.ts: Type-safe guard helpers including invariant assertions, exhaustive switch checks, and utilities for safely handling nullable values.
frontend/src/utils/clipboard.ts: Safe clipboard utility that attempts modern Clipboard API with fallback to document.execCommand, returning structured success/failure results.
frontend/src/utils/imageProcessing.ts: Canvas-based image manipulation utilities for rotating, enhancing contrast/brightness, applying zoom, and cropping images, all returning data URLs.
frontend/src/utils/qr.ts: QR code generation and download utilities using external API service (qrserver.com) with safe error handling and structured results.
frontend/src/utils/safeStorage.ts: Safe localStorage wrapper with availability detection and non-throwing get/set/remove operations that return structured success/error results.
frontend/src/utils/shareUrl.ts: Utility functions for computing shareable app URLs, providing both origin-only and full URL including hash.
frontend/src/utils/useOnUnmount.ts: React hook for safely running cleanup logic on component unmount, supporting both synchronous and asynchronous cleanup functions.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending default theme with custom OKLCH color system, container settings, border radius variables, and animation keyframes for accordions.
project_state.json: Project state tracking document for pest technician application, listing existing Google Maps integration features and pending feature requests for GPS coordinates in backend.
